title: TFC Season Notifier
description: A simple TerraFirmaCraft addon that displays a customizable notification whenever the in-game season (month) changes.
body:
# TFC Season Notifier

A simple TerraFirmaCraft addon that displays a customizable notification whenever the in-game season (month) changes. Perfect for players who want seasonal reminders for planting, harvesting, or preparing for winter.

The notification text is automatically localized based on the game's language settings with possibility to use custom texts. In the config file (/config folder), you can enable or disable notifications and adjust their style (duration, color), including per-month customization.
